fields.description: The workbook (BOQs) this dismissal belongs to. Denormalized (mirrors BoQ Cell Pricing) so the layer is filterable by BoQ.
fields.label: BoQ

fields.description: The committed sheet name, stored VERBATIM (#152 -- never stripped/trimmed). Part of the durable Excel-address identity (survives a re-commit).
fields.label: Sheet Name

fields.description: The source Excel row number this dismissal acknowledges (= BOQ Nodes.source_row_number = the committed grid row_number). Durable identity component. A dismissal is PER-ROW (no col_letter).
fields.label: Excel Row

fields.description: Which review-strip entry kind this dismissal acknowledges: one of the four computed flags (needs_rate / qty_anomaly / broken / not_yet) or a remark. The discriminator that lets one row carry several independent dismissals. Identity component.
fields.label: Flag Kind

fields.description: The committed-tier commit_version of the sheet this dismissal annotates. Annotation is anchored to a committed version; identity component.
fields.label: Committed Version

fields.description: A copy of the committed row's description at dismiss time -- a copy-forward MATCH GUARD (a future copy-forward slice warns when the committed description changed under a dismissal). NOT part of the unique key; never branched on.
fields.label: Description (guard)

fields.description: Per-(boq, sheet_name, excel_row, flag_kind, committed_version) dismissal version. Incremented on re-dismiss by the write path (freeze-and-supersede, mirroring the pricing tier).
fields.label: Dismissal Version

fields.description: Exactly one current dismissal record per (boq, sheet_name, excel_row, flag_kind, committed_version). The one-current invariant is enforced by the write path (pricing.py save_cell_dismissal), NOT in this controller (mirrors the pricing-tier convention). A rate edit RE-ARMS (freezes -> is_current=0) the four computed kinds via save_cell_price; the read path returns only is_current=1.
fields.label: Is Current

fields.description: When this dismissal record was written. Set by the write path.
fields.label: Dismissed At

fields.description: The user who dismissed this entry. Set by the write path.
fields.label: Dismissed By

fields.description: The finalize-pricing lock for this committed version. When set, the dismissal for this row/kind is finalized (a later finalize-pricing slice enforces the lock semantics; this slice only declares the marker -- mirrors BoQ Cell Pricing.is_finalized).
fields.label: Is Finalized
